---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a circuit, a constraint, or tooling change
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What the current circuits cannot prove, or what is awkward in the tooling.

## Proposed change

The new template, constraint, or script. Note the public inputs and their order.

## Impact

- Verifying key: changed / unchanged (a change needs a re-export to `jat-program`)
- Proving key: changed / unchanged (a change needs a fresh trusted setup)
- SDK: does proof generation in `jat-sdk` need to change
